menu_stable_shot_beta_desc:
BASIC: You gain 8 weapon accuracy.

ACE: You gain 16 additional weapon accuracy.
menu_medic_2x_beta_desc:
BASIC: Your doctor bags have 2 more charges.

ACE: You can now deploy 2 Doctor Bags instead of just one.
menu_ammo_2x_beta_desc:
BASIC: Each ammo bag contains 50% more ammunition.

ACE: You can now place 2 ammo bags instead of just one.
menu_steady_grip_beta_desc:
BASIC: You gain 8 weapon stability.

ACE: You gain 16 additional weapon stability.
